process.title: Website Design Process
process.sub: Take a peek behind the curtain and explore the custom web design process our team follows. We build custom sites for brands of all sizes that deliver measurable results.

steps.title: Web Strategy
steps.intro: We use in-depth research and analysis as key pillars to build a step-by-step plan that expands your digital presence and drives online growth.
items: Identify your target audiences
Analyze user pain-points & define your UVPs
Define key performance indicators (KPIs)
Create a roadmap to growing your brand online

steps.title: Planning & Information Architecture
steps.intro: We utilize proven techniques to map your content, meet user intentions and create an engaging user experience. By outlining your site's structure, we ensure seamless user journeys to key conversion points.
steps.introBold: we ensure seamless user journeys to key conversion points
steps.listTitle: Here's how our team does it:
items: We develop a base-level user flow & sitemap
We utilize wireframing to create a seamless conversion funnel
We add on-brand, consistent messaging to your structure

steps.title: Creative Design
steps.intro: This stage is where you will see your site come to life. Our award-winning designers implement your unique branding elements to add your identity to your custom web design.
steps.listTitle: With just 50 milliseconds to make a good first impression, your website needs to stand out. To achieve this, we:
items: Thoughtfully place design features to guide the user journey
Utilize interactive videos & animations
Create custom, branded illustrations
Ensure accessibility & search engine optimization

steps.title: Responsive Development
steps.intro: A responsive website is fast, accessible and easy to navigate. It automatically scales to various screen sizes and devices, driving user experience and climbing search engine rankings.
steps.listTitle: To ensure your website reaches and satisfies every user, we:
items: Gather touchpoint & user-channel insights
Transform your wireframes into a flexible UI
Test across devices before approval & launch

steps.title: Quality Assurance (QA)
steps.intro: We pride ourselves on delivering measurable results and professional outcomes. By following a strict quality assurance (QA) protocol, we guarantee a high-quality digital experience for your brand.
steps.introBold: we pride ourselves on delivering measurable results and professional outcomes
items: Actively involve our clients throughout every project
Meticulously test all designs to catch errors
Use tried-and-tested tools to secure before launch

steps.title: Launch & Optimization
steps.intro: Our end-to-end website design services cover both launch and post-launch support. We meticulously monitor, test and optimize your website elements to ensure every part of your site is functioning optimally.
steps.listTitle: Our design specialists make this happen by:
items: Following a strict protocol for every website launch
Offering post-launch maintenance & optimization
Creating & implementing a digital marketing plan to drive awareness across touchpoints

items.title: Have A Clear Web Strategy
items.description: Before your site goes live, you need a real plan. As a full-service web design agency, we research your industry, see what competitors are doing and define your target market. Then, we develop a strategy that matches your business goals.

items.title: Build A Strong Online Presence
items.description: High bounce rates mean something's wrong. Maybe the site and navigation are confusing, so visitors can't find what they need or perhaps the content loads slowly. As a full-service web design agency, we build sites that are easy to navigate and look good while users explore them. When the experience is smooth, visitors stay longer and are more likely to convert.

items.title: Boost Conversion Rates With User-Centric Design
items.description: Good design makes people take action. We are a web design agency that builds sites around what users do and not just what looks good. The layout of your site, its flow, the visuals we use and the position of buttons are all important for turning your visitors into customers.

items.title: Increase User Engagement
items.description: Your website is often the first impression potential customers get and having a well-designed site helps you establish credibility in your field. As an award-winning web design agency, we've worked with companies at different stages, some starting from scratch, others rebuilding what they had and helped them develop an online presence that earns trust and attracts the right customers.

items.title: Create A Custom eCommerce Design For Better Performance
items.description: Online stores need to look good enough that people want to buy and work smoothly enough that they complete the checkout process. Our award-winning designers build stores that do both. The design of your site matters as it directly affects how much you sell.

items.title: Optimize For Search Engines
items.description: Good search engine optimization helps Google find and rank your site. We are a web design agency that takes care of the optimization so you show up in search results when potential customers are looking for what you sell. It's simple; better rankings bring in more traffic without having to pay for ads.

items.title: Improve Your Load Times & Retain More Visitors
items.description: Slow websites lose customers. If your site takes too long to load, visitors bounce back and go somewhere else. We work on speeding your site by compressing images, streamlining code, eliminating potential server issues and fixing bugs. The faster your site runs, the better your chances of increasing your conversion rates.

items.title: Receive Ongoing Support & Maintenance
items.description: Your site needs regular updates and security monitoring. We provide ongoing support to keep everything running smoothly. That way, your site stays secure and up-to-date at all times.

partners.title: Digital Solutions That Drive Growth
partners.sub: From web development to e-commerce and digital marketing, we deliver end-to-end solutions tailored to your business.
partners.subBold: we deliver end-to-end solutions tailored to your business

about.heroSubtitle: We're a team of passionate digital experts dedicated to helping businesses succeed online
about.mission1: To empower businesses of all sizes with cutting-edge digital solutions that drive growth, enhance customer experiences, and create lasting value. We believe that every business deserves access to world-class digital services, regardless of their size or industry.
about.mission2: Our mission is to bridge the gap between complex technology and business success, making digital transformation accessible, understandable, and achievable for everyone.
about.vision1: To become the most trusted digital services partner globally, recognized for our innovation, reliability, and unwavering commitment to client success. We envision a future where every business can leverage digital technology to its full potential.
about.vision2: Through continuous innovation, exceptional service delivery, and strategic partnerships, we aim to shape the future of digital business solutions and set new industry standards.
about.story1: Xentio Digital was founded in 2015 with a simple yet powerful vision: to make enterprise-grade digital solutions accessible to businesses of all sizes. What started as a small team of passionate developers and designers has grown into a full-service digital agency serving clients across multiple industries.
about.story2: Over the years, we've completed hundreds of successful projects, from small business websites to complex enterprise applications. Our commitment to quality, innovation, and client satisfaction has earned us a reputation as a trusted partner in digital transformation.
about.story3: Today, we continue to evolve, staying at the forefront of technology trends while maintaining our core values of integrity, excellence, and partnership. We're not just service providers—we're your digital growth partners.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do

developer.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
developer.description: We are looking for an experienced full-stack developer to join our development team. You will work on exciting projects using modern technologies like React, Next.js, Node.js, and more.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in full-stack development
Strong knowledge of React, Next.js, and Node.js

designer.title: UX/UI Designer
designer.description: Join our design team to create beautiful, user-centered interfaces. You will work closely with clients and developers to bring designs to life.
requirements: Proficiency in Figma, Adobe XD, or similar tools

marketing.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
marketing.description: Help our clients grow their online presence through SEO, content marketing, and digital advertising strategies.
requirements: Experience with Google Analytics and marketing tools

mobile.title: Mobile App Developer
mobile.description: Develop native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android. Work on exciting projects that reach millions of users.
requirements: 4+ years of mobile app development experience
Proficiency in React Native, Swift, or Kotlin
Experience with app store submission and deployment
Understanding of mobile UI/UX best practices
